creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text: The OpenBSD patch did not solve the crash here. However, replacing "-mllvm -inline-threshold=128" with "-O1" is essentially dim's suggestion from comment #5 and Rainer's question from https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=241096#c6. Doing so has allowed me to build the port on my 12-i386 jail with no issues.
